title: Quick Invoice: Save-as-Draft disabled when description empty, but Send-&-Create is active (inconsistent validation)
description: Observed visually: Modal fields fill OK except description ("What are you charging for?" remains empty with placeholder visible). Save as Draft stays DISABLED while Send & Create button is ACTIVE. Two findings: (a) description is required для Save as Draft but NOT для Send & Create (inconsistent validation), (b) keyboard.fill on textarea via my generic selector did не attach — actual input element needs more specific selector.
steps_to_reproduce: 4. Leave "What are you charging for?" empty
5. Note Save as Draft disabled but Send & Create enabled
fix_note: Visual deception bug: Send & Create disabled:opacity-40 still showed gradient. Replaced с disabled:from-slate-700 etc — both buttons now flat gray when disabled. Both have identical disabled logic (was не inconsistent validation как audit suggested).

title: Cookie consent banner intercepts pointer events on /clients/new step 2 Next button
description: Cookie consent banner (role=dialog aria-label='Cookie consent', fixed bottom z-50) overlaps the step 2 Next button on /clients/new wizard. Playwright reports the banner's subtree intercepts the pointer events at the Next button's click coordinates — meaning user cannot advance the wizard until cookie banner dismissed. Banner does NOT block step 1 Next (page is shorter on step 1). This blocks the entire wizard на step 2+ for users who don't dismiss banner first.
steps_to_reproduce: 3. Fill step 1 fields, click Next — step 1 Next works
4. On step 2, scroll к Next button OR see it at bottom
5. Click Next — banner intercepts, click никогда reaches button
fix_note: Cookie banner pointer-events-none/auto fix. Verified live: wizard step 1→step 2 transition works с banner visible.

title: Wizard step 1 inputs lack <label> markup (accessibility)
description: Inputs (Full Name, Company, Email, Phone, Country) have no associated <label for=...> element. Playwright getByLabel() returns no match для all 5 fields. Screen-reader users lose field context. Visible UI uses uppercase eyebrow text instead of semantic labels. Recommendation: wrap each input в <label> OR use aria-labelledby+visible label k preserve accessibility.
steps_to_reproduce: 3. Confirm no <label for> nor aria-label attached

title: Validation error color uses text-red-500 instead of design-system rose-500
description: Empty-submit validation errors на /clients/new render с classes 'text-red-500' / 'text-red-400'. Design system pattern (per backlog_button_color_inconsistency и B3.20 destructive pattern) uses 'rose' palette. Inconsistency between red-500 (here) и rose-500 (Delete pattern elsewhere) suggests two color tokens for negative state.
steps_to_reproduce: 3. Inspect 'Full name is required' classes — text-red-500

title: Client detail page has 6+ buttons literally labeled 'Generate' (selector + UX ambiguity)
description: On a single client detail page, multiple AI-feature buttons share the exact label 'Generate' (AI Client Summary, AI Project Brief, Win-back Email, Referral Request Email, etc.). Plus 'Regenerate' for portal link. Selector ambiguity + UX cognitive load. Recommend distinct labels e.g. 'Generate Summary' / 'Generate Brief' / 'Generate Email'.
steps_to_reproduce: 2. Inspect Generate buttons count в DOM

title: Portal-link Regenerate confirmation modal uses z-[9999] inset-0 (good practice; document)
description: When 'Regenerate' clicked on Client Portal link section, full-viewport modal с backdrop-blur opens asking 'Are you sure? Regenerate the portal link? The old link will stop working immediately.' c Cancel/Confirm. Good UX protection. Z-index z-[9999] highest in audit. Documenting that several modal layers exist (cookie banner z-50, portal regenerate z-9999); if more modals stack, layering rules need explicit docs.

title: AI feature "AI Status Summary": no trigger button found
description: Could not locate any of: Generate, Refresh, Regenerate near "/Status Summary|AI Status/i" heading.
fix_note: Real cause was String.prototype.matchAll without /g flag (TypeError). Fixed. Now returns 200, real analysis output, 4.9s latency.

title: AI Scope Checker /api/ai/scope-check returns HTTP 500
description: Filled scope text + clicked Check Scope. Network response: 500 Internal Server Error from /api/ai/scope-check. Latency 20.6s before timeout (suggests server-side AI provider failure OR endpoint bug). UI does NOT surface the error к user — Check Scope button returns к idle state, no error toast, no error inline. Silent failure.
steps_to_reproduce: 2. Scroll к AI Scope Checker section
5. Observe 500 response в network tab + no UI error
fix_note: Real cause was String.prototype.matchAll without /g flag (TypeError). Fixed. Now returns 200, real analysis output, 4.9s latency.

title: AI feature "AI Project Brief" heading not found на project detail
description: Could not locate "/Project Brief|AI Brief/i" text section.
fix_note: Scope Checker UI now catches errors + displays inline red banner с AlertTriangle. Combined с FA-019 fix, endpoint returns real output, but error path now also surfaced properly.

title: AI Scope Checker — server error не surfaced к user
description: When /api/ai/scope-check returns 500, the UI does not show error toast, inline error message, or any indication к the user that the action failed. Check Scope button returns к clickable state silently. User assumes nothing happened, retries, gets same silent failure.
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Trigger Check Scope while endpoint returns 500
fix_note: Scope Checker UI now catches errors + displays inline red banner с AlertTriangle. Combined с FA-019 fix, endpoint returns real output, but error path now also surfaced properly.

title: Pass 2 could не trigger AI Status Summary/Brief/Milestones on minimal project (selector limitation OR conditional rendering)
description: Pass 2 audit could not locate 'AI Status Summary' / 'AI Project Brief' / 'Generate Milestones' buttons on /projects/[id] для the tested project (minimal data — 1 active project, no tasks, no time entries). HOWEVER: Batch 3 Section 4 audit (Pass 1, screenshot s4-05c) DID capture AI Status Summary working с output 'I've completed the initial wireframes для Q2 Product Redesign...'. Conclusion: features EXIST and DO work, but were either (a) conditionally rendered based on project state (tasks/time entries/milestones required) OR (b) selector miss в this pass. NOT a Phase 11 regression — features confirmed alive в prior audit. Re-test on populated project post-launch к confirm conditional logic + document trigger conditions.
steps_to_reproduce: 3. Search для 'AI Status Summary' / 'AI Project Brief' / 'Generate Milestones'
4. Compare к Batch 3 Section 4 s4-05c screenshot showing feature working
5. Re-test on populated project к determine conditional rendering rules

title: AI Contract Risk Analyzer fails: 'Analysis failed — please try again' after 46s wait
description: Opened /contracts/analyze?contractId=... (contract auto-loaded в textarea, 4231 chars). Clicked 'Analyze Contract' button. After 46 seconds, page rendered 'Analysis failed — please try again' inline error. No /api/ai/* call observed in network listener (analyzer may use different endpoint path OR endpoint hung). Note: error IS surfaced к user (unlike FA-020 silent scope-check failure). But feature broken end-to-end.
steps_to_reproduce: 2. On detail page click 'Full Risk Report'
3. Click 'Analyze Contract' on the analyzer page
5. Observe 'Analysis failed — please try again' error
fix_note: Migrated /api/contracts/analyze from direct Anthropic SDK к Phase 11 abstraction (feature='legal' → contract bucket → Gemini Pro с fallback). Anthropic credit balance was $0, blocking 687 endpoints. Now 200 status, 5.9s latency, 0 Cyrillic, structured Medium Risk 60/100 output.

title: Full Risk Report opens с contract text pre-loaded but не auto-analyzed
description: Clicking "Full Risk Report" CTA on contract detail navigates к /contracts/analyze?contractId=... с the contract text auto-loaded в the textarea. User then must click ANOTHER "Analyze Contract" button к trigger AI. Extra click adds friction. Recommend either (a) auto-analyze on landing (one less click) с loading spinner, OR (b) rename CTA к "Open Risk Analyzer" к set correct expectation.
steps_to_reproduce: 3. Observe contract pre-loaded но no analysis fired
5. AI fires only after second click

title: Generate Proposal button disabled after filling visible fields
description: After filling freelancer/client/email/service-type/scope/budget/timeline, button remains disabled. Required-empty: ["Describe the project: what needs to be built, key requirements, special constraints..."]
steps_to_reproduce: 2. Fill all visible fields на top form
